creator: fernape@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 188296
patch against the ports tree

The attached patch updates devel/visualparadigm to 14.2 build 20171107. The upstream project does not provide information for minor updates.

- Q/A:
  * port test: OK
  * portlint -AC: OK
  * poudriere builds for {10.3,10.4,11.0,11.1}{i386,amd64}: OK

Logs can be found (for a limited time) here:
https://www.dropbox.com/sh/b898rp1e2urrk0x/AABW8uQNGF9xpXD51qOOvk6ua?dl=0
